46630.note: Deployed to Robinhood Chain testnet 2026-06-05 (solc 0.8.34). Tx: 0x54764c3def25c5f6a0116a0dd069c1fb27ecd52891a9cdc5e04fa58a97e32ab1. Owner + agent signer: 0xEC6613578be203e23e360A3985EA1601435D5907. Robinhood (Arbitrum Orbit) runs cancun/PUSH0 bytecode; the forge EIP-3855 warning is a stale chain-id allowlist, not a runtime limit. executeEnvelope verified non-reverting (tx 0x9e551909082204669b0e2f44759d0d280dd8c985afb7a74b517ee412e4c5695c). Robinhood eth_estimateGas under-reports CREATE code-deposit, so deploy needs --gas-estimate-multiplier 300.
